TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bilus, title = Bilus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bilus} }

S.FORM: alang Bilus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 33 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 27 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bilus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Bilus hya' ga Silong. tay 'llaw na Bilus hya' ga Snazi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Bilus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 33 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 27 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bilus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Bilus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Bilus hya' ga Silong. tay 'llaw na Bilus hya' ga Snazi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βilus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. uli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiloŋ. taj ʔllaw na βilus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnazi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
